home.subtitle: Welcome to your institution's certificate management center.

lowBalance.title: Low Balance Warning
lowBalance.desc: Your current balance is {balance}. Load balance to avoid interruptions in certificate creation.

charts.title: Certificate and Student Statistics
charts.subtitle: Certificate creation and student addition activities for the last 30 days.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pendingDesc: {count} certificates are waiting for your approval

certificates.title: Certificate Management
certificates.subtitle: View and manage all created certificates.
certificates.createNewDescription: Follow these steps to create a new certificate.

classic.name: Classic
classic.description: Traditional and formal look. Ideal for corporate use.

modern.name: Modern
modern.description: Minimal and contemporary design. Clean and professional.

creative.name: Creative
creative.description: Colorful and dynamic design. Eye-catching and unique.

elegant.name: Elegant
elegant.description: Graceful wave patterns with gold accent, sophisticated design.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Lined frame with minimal corporate design.

executive.name: Executive
executive.description: Gold/brown decorative frame, formal academic style.

minimal.name: Minimal
minimal.description: Clean design, gold lines, dual signature area.

template.title: Template Selection
template.subtitle: Select and preview the certificate template

modal.footerNote: Select this template for your certificate

training.title: Training Selection
training.subtitle: Select the training for the certificate.

students.title: Add Students
students.subtitle: Add students who will receive the certificate.

partners.title: Partner Selection
partners.subtitle: Select partner(s) and upper institution approval.
partners.uiaHint: If yes, you must select a partner as the upper institution responsible.
partners.externalCannotBeUia: External partner cannot be upper institution responsible.

review.title: Summary and Approval
review.subtitle: Review your selections and submit the certificate for approval.
review.reviseSubtitle: You are editing a rejected certificate. You can check and update the steps below.
review.reviseBoxDescription: You are editing a rejected certificate. You can change any of the steps below.

status.enoughDesc: Provision will be reserved and deducted upon approval.
status.notEnoughDesc: Load balance or reduce student count.

actions.createdSuccess: Certificate created successfully! Sent for institution approval.
actions.unexpectedError: An error occurred. Please try again.
actions.revisedSuccess: Certificate successfully revised and submitted for approval!

create.reviseModeBanner: Revision Mode: You are editing a rejected certificate

import.title: Bulk Certificate Creation
import.subtitle: Create certificates for your students in bulk using a single Excel file with different properties.
import.paymentRequired: Payment system is active. Payment step is required for certificate creation in this flow.
import.createError: An error occurred while creating certificates: {error}
import.unknownError: An unexpected error occurred. Please check your information and try again.
import.networkError: Could not reach the server. Please check your connection and try again.

nationalId.description: Student TC Identity Number (11 digits, required). Matches the TC number registered in the system.

startDate.description: Certificate start date. Optional. Enter if the training was conducted over a specific period.

endDate.description: Certificate end/issue date. REQUIRED. If left blank, today's date will be used.

partnerIds.description: Partner organization IDs (comma-separated, must start with ACR- or RFR-)

uiaRequired.description: Is Upper Institution Approval required? (0 or 1)

uiaResponsibleId.description: UIA responsible (must start with ACR-, required if UIA_REQUIRED=1)

approvalCode.specialNote: IMPORTANT: LEAVE THIS COLUMN EMPTY! UIA code is entered by the partner on the approval screen. It should not be filled in Excel.

guide.autoGroupDesc: Rows with the same training, template, date and partner information are automatically converted into a single certificate group.
guide.duplicateFileWarningDesc: If you upload a file with the same name as a previously uploaded file, the system will not reprocess it. If you have made changes to your file, please rename it (e.g., certificates_v2.xlsx) before uploading again. Each uploaded file must have a unique name.

downloadTemplate.description: Download the Excel template to enter your data in the correct format. Each row represents a certificate to be issued to a student.

uploader.title: Upload Your File
uploader.description: Select your completed Excel file. The data will be processed immediately.

step3.title: Validation and Preview
step3.desc: Excel file processed successfully. You can review the certificate groups to be created below.

step4.title: Confirm and Create Certificates
step4.desc: All {groups} groups validated and ready to create certificates for {students} students.

loading.downloadingBulkDesc: All certificates are being downloaded as ZIP. This may take a few minutes, please wait...

email.error: An error occurred while sending the email.
email.noEmail: Student does not have an email address

modal.pendingNote: Certificates pending approval are listed here.

actions.confirmReject: Are you sure you want to reject this certificate?
actions.confirmApproveCredit: Approving this certificate will deduct {count} credits. Do you want to continue?
actions.confirmResubmit: Are you sure you want to resubmit this certificate for approval?
actions.confirmRevise: Are you sure you want to revise this certificate? You will switch to editing mode with current certificate details.

messages.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits! This action requires {required} credits. Current: {balance} credits

students.subtitle: Manage student records and certificates.

import.subtitle: Upload student information from an Excel file.
import.howToFill: How should I fill in the Excel?

infoItems.eachRow: Each row must contain only one student.
infoItems.uniqueTc: National ID numbers must be unique.
infoItems.existingTc: Existing National IDs will be updated.
infoItems.optionalFields: Email and phone fields are optional.

secondaryLastName.description: Secondary last name (maiden name, etc.) - optional. Can be displayed on certificate if provided.
secondaryLastName.specialNote: This field is optional. Enter if the student has an old, new, or maiden name.

step1.description: Download and fill in the template.

step2.title: Upload Your File

step3.title: Validate and Create
step3.description: We will validate the uploaded file.

messages.validationError: There are validation errors in the file.

students.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this student?

form.otherLastNamePlaceholder: e.g., maiden name or married name
form.surnameHint: Checked surname(s) will be displayed on certificates. Both surnames are searchable.

success.addedPending: Partner request has been sent for admin approval.

signature.title: Certificate Signature
signature.description: Upload your corporate signature to appear on certificates. The signature should have a transparent background.
signature.nameNote: Name that appears below the signature on the certificate
signature.titleNote: Title that appears below the name

requirements.title: Signature Requirements
requirements.text: PNG format (required for transparent background) • Max. 100KB • Max. 400x200 pixels

errors.formatError: Signature file must be in PNG format (for transparent background).
errors.dimensionsError: Signature dimensions must be maximum 400x200 pixels.
